title: >= includes the boundary
problem: Decide whether someone aged 18 counts as an adult (18 or older) and store the yes/no answer.

trace.checkpoint_prompt: age is 18. After `is_adult = age >= 18` runs, what will is_adult be?

trace.note: is_adult = (18 >= 18) = True. `>=` includes the boundary. The stored value is a bool — a comparison is a yes/no value you can keep and reuse.
